title: Firefighting efforts ongoing at Oudemuragie and De Rust areas
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Firefighter teams from Oudtshoorn Municipality, Garden Route District Municipality, Working on Fire and CapeNature are hard at work on the fires at Oudemuragie and De Rust.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Firefighter teams from Oudtshoorn Municipality, Garden Route District Municipality, Working on Fire and CapeNature are hard at work on the fires at Oudemuragie and De Rust."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The fireline is spreading to the north and east flanks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Farmlands on the southern and northern flanks are at risk, and the situation is being closely monitored.","html":"Farmlands on the southern and northern flanks are at risk, and the situation is being closely monitored."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There is a lot of smoke with a southerly wind.","html":"There is a lot of smoke with a southerly wind."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Resources on scene:","html":"Resources on scene: "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Working on Fire has 21 ground teams, CapeNature 14 ground teams, two SWBG Skid units as well as two units from Oudtshoorn. Arial operations are in place and the tropping of 21 ground teams to commence.  A suppression from the southwest flank is planned then easterly.","html":"Working on Fire has 21 ground teams, CapeNature 14 ground teams, two SWBG Skid units as well as two units from Oudtshoorn. Arial operations are in place and the tropping of 21 ground teams to commence. A suppression from the southwest flank is planned then easterly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents are urged to report any fire or smoke to the control room at 044 203 7800.","html":"Residents are urged to report any fire or smoke to the control room at 044 203 7800."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Firefighting efforts ongoing at Oudemuragie and De Rust areas
